what_failed: alerted key uses message ts only (alerted[ts]). If message A mentions bot B and bot C, and B is alerted first, alerted[ts] is written. Next pulse: ContainsKey(ts) = true -> entire message skipped -> C never checked again.
Fix: use composite key 'ts-mentionedId' to track per-bot independently.
lesson: Deduplication keys must be scoped to the specific entity being tracked, not the parent container. alerted[ts] is correct only when there is exactly one trackable thing per message.
